name: ios-app-director
description: A roadmap-driven iOS app development engine with one bootstrap entry point, design-first setup, native SwiftUI scaffolding, simulator validation, receipts, and production-minded delivery loops.

interface.shortDescription: Bootstrap, direct, validate, harden, and ship roadmap-driven iOS app work
interface.longDescription: Use iOS App Director to turn app intent and Stitch concepts into a roadmap-driven delivery workflow: bootstrap through one public entry point, generate or inspect design-first screen sets, synthesize a quality-controlled feature map, preserve the visual spine, create and launch the initial native SwiftUI Xcode scaffold with real app naming, record a non-blocking setup receipt, implement and validate SwiftUI features with XcodeBuildMCP, evolve Cloudflare-backed service layers, apply regression and evidence discipline, and close out features with a repeatable definition of done.
defaultPrompt: Use iOS App Bootstrap as the single setup entry point for a new NATIVE READY app.
Bootstrap from a Stitch project, screenshots, or product idea through the first simulator launch and receipt.
Use iOS App Director to continue delivery from a validated active baton.
